texts.chars: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance standards and requirements
Border changes to primary color + ring
Rule: All interactive elements must have a visible focus indicator with minimum 3:1 contrast ratio against the background.
Rule: Minimum clickable/touchable area must be at least 40×40px. Recommended size is 48×48px for better usability.
This text has sufficient contrast against its background (minimum 4.5:1 ratio required for body text)
Large text (18px+ or 14px+ bold) requires minimum 3:1 contrast ratio
Non-text UI elements require minimum 3:1 contrast ratio
Rule: Tab order must follow logical reading order (left-to-right, top-to-bottom). Use semantic HTML and avoid positive tabindex values.
⚠ Please enter a valid email address
Error message appears directly below the input field with clear visual association
Error message placement disrupts the natural reading flow

Rule: Error messages must appear immediately after the associated input field, use clear language, and include an icon or visual indicator. Use aria-describedby to programmatically link errors to inputs.
